title: Use These 17 Claude Plugins, It Will Make You 10x Better.
summary: Chase AI curates 17 Claude plugins and integrations organized by category: design, productivity, and data tools. Featured plugins include Taste Skill, Impeccable, Playwright CLI, Firecrawl, LightRAG, and others designed to enhance Claude Code workflows. The video targets developers building agencies and landing clients.
writeup: Chase AI walks through 17 plugins, skills, and CLIs that extend Claude, grouped into design, productivity, and data categories. Named tools include Playwright CLI, Firecrawl, LightRAG, and Stripe CLI. The framing targets developers who want to broaden Claude's capabilities for code generation and building agents.
